meta.title: Sky AutoRent — Premium Car Rental
meta.description: Premium car rental. Toyota, Maserati, Mercedes, BMW. No hidden fees.

hero.title: Premium car
hero.subtitle: Premium and comfortable car rental. No hidden fees, delivery and 24/7 support. Choose a car from the catalog, submit a request — we'll handle the rest.

catalog.label: Catalog
catalog.pageDesc: Choose the right car — from a comfortable Camry to a prestigious Land Cruiser 200. All models are available for booking.

0.title: No hidden fees
0.text: Fixed rental price. All terms are transparent from the first call.

1.title: Car delivery
1.text: We deliver the car to a convenient location — airport, hotel or office.

2.title: Premium service
2.text: Clean cars, full insurance and 24/7 support throughout the rental.

contacts.label: Contacts
contacts.title: Get in touch
contacts.pageDesc: Submit a request via the form or contact us directly — we'll respond shortly.

form.title: Submit a request
form.subtitle: Fill out the form — our manager will contact you shortly
form.name: Your name
form.success: Request sent! We will contact you shortly.
form.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

footer.desc: Premium car rental. We'll find the perfect car for your trip, business or special occasion.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

toyota-camry.description: Perfect for city and business trips. Quiet cabin, economical fuel consumption and Toyota's legendary reliability.

toyota-land-cruiser-200.description: Legendary off-roader for those who value status, power and absolute comfort on any road.

toyota-camry-hybrid.description: Hybrid Camry combines smooth ride, low fuel consumption and modern safety technologies.

maserati-ghibli.description: Italian elegance and sporty character. For special occasions when every mile matters.

mercedes-e200.description: Classic German premium — soft suspension, impeccable finish and latest-generation technology.

bmw-530i.description: Dynamic sedan for drivers who love to be behind the wheel. Precise steering and rich equipment.
